title: Promote improvement draft with explicit review gate
problem: A medium-risk improvement draft exists in data/tickets/improvement_ticket_latest.json (claim quote span validation) but has not been promoted to the builder queue. The operator loop surfaces it as a review-gated action.
acceptance_criteria: Operator runs promote-improvement-ticket with --confirm after human review.
No auto-edit of TICKET_QUEUE.md without explicit review.
Pre-ticket audit written if risk_level medium requires it before implementation.
non_goals: Do not implement claim validation changes in the same ticket as promotion.
Do not auto-promote during fixture-mode run.
rollback_plan: Delete promoted tickets/ticket-048.json and revert queue notes.
